error_signature: Wrong signature trying to load DB from file
title: Redis DB loading error due to wrong signature
symptom: Redis fails to start with a fatal error indicating a wrong signature while trying to load the database from a file. The server exits immediately after initialization.
applies_when: Redis attempts to load data from dump.rdb
not_this_if: Redis is running without persistent storage
root_cause: The error occurs when Redis attempts to load a database file (dump.rdb) that is corrupted or not in the expected format. This can happen due to improper shutdowns or file system issues.
fix_steps: Delete the dump.rdb and temp.rdb files from the specified volume
agent_instruction: Delete the dump.rdb and temp.rdb files to resolve the loading error.
safety_notes: Deleting dump.rdb will result in loss of all stored data in Redis.
